days.text: Overcast. Occasional showers, heavy at times. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers at first. Force 3 to 4 north to northeasterly winds.
Cloudy apart from sunny intervals. Force 3 to 4 easterly winds.
Mainly cloudy. A few showers. A few thunderstorms later. Force 3 to 4 east to southeasterly winds with gusts.
Mainly cloudy. Occasional showers. A few thunderstorms. Force 3 to 4 southerly winds with gusts.
